description: Agent registry for OpenCode Global Config — machine-readable agent cards for discovery and orchestration

agents.description: Analiza arquitectura, dependencias y riesgos antes de modificar código.
agents.special: No modifica archivos ni ejecuta comandos. Entrega diagnóstico, stack, archivos críticos, riesgos, plan por fases y pruebas recomendadas.

agents.description: Divide tareas complejas en fases pequeñas y verificables.
agents.special: Crea planes con criterios de éxito verificables. Divide en fases ordenadas por prioridad. Requiere que cada fase tenga condición de éxito medible. Aplica las forcing questions de plan-eng-review (data flow, edge cases, test matrix, security) antes de aprobar un plan.
Usa 4 principios Karpathy: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven. test-first: escribe test antes de implementación.

agents.description: Implementa con confirmación antes de cada edición — máximo control.
agents.special: Misma lógica que builder pero confirma antes de cada edición. Para proyectos nuevos o paths críticos (auth, payments, DB schema, infra).

agents.description: Revisa bugs, seguridad, edge cases, estilo y pruebas.
agents.special: Usa rubrics/code-review.md como gate. Reporta bloqueantes, recomendaciones importantes y mejoras opcionales. Aprobado/No aprobado.

agents.description: Auditoría de seguridad, vulnerabilidades y configuración de riesgo.
agents.special: Busca: SQL injection, XSS, credenciales hardcodeadas, tokens en logs, config insegura. Usa rubrics/security-review.md como gate.

agents.description: Genera y mantiene documentación técnica del proyecto.
agents.special: Genera README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, API.md, DEPLOY.md según el proyecto. Docs-First: revisa docs/ existente antes de crear nuevo.

agents.description: Automatización DevOps, CI/CD, infraestructura y monitoreo.
agents.special: Dockerfile, CI/CD, Kubernetes, Terraform. Requiere profile devops activo para ejecutar cambios de infraestructura.

agents.description: Diagnostica y resuelve problemas de producción, logs y errores.
agents.special: Reversibility-weighted risk: acciones reversibles requieren menos aprobación. Clasifica P1/P2/P3, identifica causa raíz, lista mitigaciones. Sigue el iron law de investigate: no fixes sin root cause, stop después de 3 fixes fallidos.

agents.description: Diseña migraciones incrementales reversibles sin tocar producción.
agents.special: Solo lectura. Diseña migraciones incrementales y reversibles para DB, servicios o datos. Cada paso debe tener rollback listo.

agents.description: Detecta cuellos de botella de performance — sin modificaciones.
agents.special: Detecta: N+1 queries, O(n²) algoritmos, I/O bloqueante, índices faltantes. Solo lectura, no modifica código.

skills.description: Goal-Driven Execution — verificar antes de implementar
Revisión de diff antes de commit
Engineering-manager mode plan review with forcing questions on data flow, edge cases, test matrix and security. Adapted from garrytan/gstack.
Reframe a product idea through six forcing questions before any code is written. Adapted from garrytan/gstack.
Systematic debugging with iron law: no fixes without root cause. Four phases with stop-after-3-fixes rule. Adapted from garrytan/gstack.
Systematic web QA methodology. Find bugs, fix atomically, verify. Three tiers (quick/standard/exhaustive). Runtime-agnostic — works with or without Playwright. Adapted from garrytan/gstack.
Runtime-agnostic web verification. Tiered: curl/wget (HTTP), lynx (text), playwright (browser). No binary deps by default. Adapted from garrytan/gstack browse/ methodology.
Detect deployment platform (Fly, Vercel, Render, Netlify, Railway, Heroku, GHA, Docker) and persist config to CLAUDE.md. Zero deps. Adapted from garrytan/gstack.

Read, extract, merge, split, rotate, watermark, create, fill forms, encrypt, and OCR PDF files. Use this skill whenever the user mentions a .pdf file or asks to produce one. Cherry-picked from anthropics/skills.

Create, edit, and improve skills for opencode-global-config. Use when a user wants to author a new skill from scratch, modify an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy. Adapted from anthropics/skills — no browser eval-viewer, no Claude-CLI subagents; uses occo + @builder + @reviewer + validate.sh.

Create, read, edit, and analyze Word documents (.docx files). Triggers: any mention of 'Word doc', 'word document', '.docx', or requests to produce professional documents with tables of contents, headings, page numbers, or letterheads. Adapted from anthropics/skills for opencode (uses python-docx, runtime-detection with graceful degradation).

Create, read, edit, and analyze Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv). Triggers: any task involving a spreadsheet file as primary input or output (open, read, edit, fix .xlsx; add columns, compute formulas, format, chart, clean messy data); create a new spreadsheet from scratch; convert between tabular formats. Adapted from anthropics/skills for opencode (uses openpyxl + optional pandas, runtime-detection with graceful degradation).

Map any folder of code, docs, papers, images, or videos into a navigable knowledge graph with an interactive HTML viewer, a queryable JSON, and a plain-language GRAPH_REPORT.md. Use when the user wants to understand a codebase, visualize architecture, find surprising connections, or explore relationships between files. Adapted from safishamsi/graphify for opencode-global-config.
